ud3.5:1.2: on one occasion the Blessed One was staying near Sāvatthī at Jeta’s Grove, Anāthapiṇḍika’s monastery.
ud3.5:1.3:
And on that occasion Ven. Mahā Moggallāna was sitting not far from the Blessed One, his legs crossed,
his body held erect, having mindfulness immersed in the body well-established within.
ud3.5:1.4:
The Blessed One saw Ven. Mahā Moggallāna sitting not far away, his legs crossed,
his body held erect, having mindfulness immersed in the body well-established within.
ud3.5:2.1: Then, on realizing the significance of that, the Blessed One on that occasion exclaimed:
ud3.5:3.1: With mindfulness immersed in the body
ud3.5:3.2: well-established, restrained with regard to the six contact-media–
